---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Projects"
description: "Research and applied projects by Dr. Erika C. Freeman — the ecology of molecules, predictive ecology, precision biogeochemistry, and carbon in practice."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.section-label}
Projects
:::

# Projects {.section-title}

```{=html}
<div class="projects-grid">
  <a class="project-card" href="publications.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/ecology-of-molecules.jpg" alt="Hundreds of molecules linked as a glowing green network above a faint mass-spectrum skyline" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">An Ecology of Molecules</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Treating the thousands of molecules in a drop of water as a living community. It's a new field I'm building, one that brings ecological thinking to the chemistry of ecosystems.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="project-card" href="publications.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/predictive-ecology.jpg" alt="A glowing forecast curve arcing over a dark lake and forest at dusk" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">Predictive Ecology</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Forecasting ecosystems, not just describing them. I co-lead work that turns rich environmental data into early signals of how carbon and water quality will shift as the world changes.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="project-card" href="protocols.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/precision-biogeochemistry.jpg" alt="A grid of molecular structures feeding into a glowing neural network" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">Precision Biogeochemistry</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Teaching AI to read water chemistry. My pipelines identify thousands of molecules in a single sample at once, turning dense mass-spectrometry data into meaning faster and more reliably than anyone could by hand.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="project-card" href="publications.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/global-ecosystem-change.jpg" alt="Golden carbon flowing from forest soil and roots into a dark lake, with molecular structures and a spectrum trace beneath the surface" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">Carbon on the Move</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Following carbon from the forest floor into the water. When land-use change washes carbon out of soils, it rewires the chemistry of rivers and lakes, and I trace what that means for the whole ecosystem.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="project-card" href="contact.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/carbon-in-practice.jpg" alt="Carbon flowing from a molecular diagram into a landscape and a data dashboard" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">Carbon in Practice</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Where the science meets real climate decisions. From carbon footprinting at a food-tech start-up to corporate environmental work, I connect molecular science to how carbon is measured, verified, and acted on.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
  <a class="project-card" href="publications.html">
    <div class="project-figure"><img src="assets/projects/kinder-academia.jpg" alt="Stylised figures supporting one another beneath a molecular constellation" loading="lazy" decoding="async"></div>
    <div class="project-body">
      <h2 class="project-title">A Kinder Academia</h2>
      <p class="project-desc">Making academic life more humane. From a Science essay on having children in academia (with Cecilia Padilla-Iglesias) to ongoing work on equity and mentorship.</p>
    </div>
  </a>
</div>
```

::: {.personal-link}
Off the clock? [Personal projects →](personal.html) *(private — write me for the password)*
:::
